  1. openserp.org

    Only include results for this siteRedo search without this siteBlock this site from all results
    Share feedback about this site

    openserp.org

    http://test.test

    OpenSERP - SERP API: Self-Host Free or Use Managed Cloud

    SERPAPI for Google, Bing, Yandex, Baidu, and DuckDuckGo. Self-host free with Docker or Go, or joinOpenSERPCloud for a fully managed endpoint.

  2. github.com

    Only include results for this siteRedo search without this siteBlock this site from all results
    Share feedback about this site

    Github

    http://test.test› karust › openserp

    OpenSERP (Search Engine Results) - GitHub

    OpenSERPis an API and CLI for accessing search engine results from Google, Yandex, Baidu, Bing, and DuckDuckGo. A developer-friendly alternative to paidSERPAPI services! Official website:openserp.org 💡OpenSerpis free andopen-source. Only links listed in this repository and on the official website are associated with the project.
    1. Request parameters
    2. Search
    3. Example request
    4. Get 20 Google results for hello world, only in English: You can replace google to yandex or baidu in query to change search engine. |
    5. Example response
    6. Images
    7. Example request
    8. Get 100 Google results for golden puppy:
    9. Example response
    See more on github.com

    Share feedback about this site

    openserp.dev

    http://test.test

    OpenSerp — SERP Scraping Platform | Pay-As-You-Go

    Scrape Google search results at scale. Upload keywords, get structuredSERPdata with keyword intelligence. Pay-as-you-go, no subscriptions.

  4. serpapi.com

    Only include results for this siteRedo search without this siteBlock this site from all results
    Share feedback about this site

    SerpApi

    http://test.test

    SerpApi: Google Search API

    SerpApi is a real-time API to access Google search results. We handle proxies, solve captchas, and parse all rich structured data for you.

    Only include results for this siteRedo search without this siteBlock this site from all results
    Share feedback about this site

    dataget.ai

    http://test.test› blogs › openserp-free-open-source-serpapi-alternative

    OpenSerp: Free Open-Source SerpAPI Alternative for LLM Search

    Dec 15, 2025OpenSerpis a freeopen-source SerpAPI alternative that enables LLMs to access Google, Bing, Baidu, and DuckDuckGo search results via a self-hosted API.

    openwebninja.com

    http://test.test› blog › best-serp-apis-2026

    Best SERP APIs in 2026: 7 Tested and Compared - OpenWeb Ninja

    3 days agoWe compared 7SERPAPIs on pricing, response time, and data depth. Code examples and JSON responses for OpenWeb Ninja, SerpAPI, DataForSEO, Serper, and more.

  7. freewebapi.com

    Only include results for this siteRedo search without this siteBlock this site from all results
    Share feedback about this site

    freewebapi.com

    http://test.test› search-apis › serp-api

    Free SERP API - FreeWebApi

    FreeSERPAPI The JSON-formatted results of web searches can be retrieved using the API, which functions as a basicSERPAPI. Designed with developers, companies, and enthusiasts in mind, this API makes it easier to incorporate search engine results into your apps.

    Scrapfly

    http://test.test› blog › posts › google-serp-api-and-alternatives

    Best SERP APIs in 2026: Official Google Alternatives & Third-Party ...

    Mar 24, 2026No official GoogleSERPAPI exists. Compare DuckDuckGo, Brave, Yandex and APIs (SerpApi, Serper, DataForSEO, Scrapfly) with benchmarks and pricing.

    Bright Data

    http://test.test› products › serp-api

    SERP API - SERP Scraper API - Free Trial - Bright Data

    Real-timeSERPscraping API with JSON/HTML output, <1s delivery, free geo targeting. 50% OFF all plans. Pay for successful requests only. Start free trial.

    Zenserp API

    http://test.test

    SERP API for Developers - Scrape Google Results in Real-Time | Zenserp

    Fetch live Google search results via a fast, reliableSERPAPI. JSON responses in <500ms. 99.9% uptime. Free plan available - Get your free API key today.
